sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 19

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 19:1
items.html:
(to the question) Bekiat Kol Mechitzot [piercing of all partitions]
At the time of the Katnut [smallness] of the Nukva, when she cleaves to him in a single wall, the Nukva receives the Lights in ZA only through an opening [Nekev], and not all the Lights of ZA are imparted to her — for then all the partitions between them would be annulled, and the two of them would become again like one body. Rather, the Lights do not pierce the partition between them, but pierce and pass only by way of an opening; meaning, according to the measure that ZA himself had at the time of his Katnut, when he too would receive in the measure of that opening. See Answer 18. (p. 777, Item 67).
